blocks.value: Restores demo repeatability: reverts pom.xml + VulnerableSearchRepository.java to the vulnerable-baseline git tag on main, and wipes every application/source_repo/build_artifact/environment/certificate out of the Concert instance.

inputs.name: code
inputs.value:
`"""
Script to make the demo repeatable:
  1. Revert pom.xml and VulnerableSearchRepository.java on `main` back to
     their known-vulnerable content (from the `vulnerable-baseline` git
     tag), via direct commits through the GitHub Contents API - no PR,
     no review, this is demo housekeeping, not a real change.
  2. Wipe every piece of demo data out of the Concert instance
     (applications, source repos, build artifacts, environments,
     certificates) via Concert's own core API, so the next demo run
     starts from a genuinely empty instance.

This uses subprocess.run() to execute curl, never use "shell=True" on
user-provided input!!

Input parameters (variables injected by workflow):
- gh_repo_url:          [required, string]  URL to the repository (e.g. https://github.com/kokunas/java-app-cve)
- gh_api_token:         [required, string]  GitHub token with contents:write on the repo
- baseline_ref:         [required, string]  Git ref holding the known-vulnerable files (e.g. "vulnerable-baseline")
- target_branch:        [required, string]  Branch to reset (e.g. "main")
- reset_files:          [required, string]  JSON array of file paths to reset, e.g. ["pom.xml", "src/.../VulnerableSearchRepository.java"]
- concert_url:          [required, string]  URL of the Concert API Gateway
- concert_api_key:      [required, string]  API Key to authenticate upon Concert
- concert_instance_id:  [required, string]  Instance ID to wipe
"""

import base64
import json as jsonlib
import re
from subprocess import run, PIPE
from sys import exit as sys_exit


def obfuscate(input_str):
    if not input_str or len(input_str) <= 8:
        return "*" * len(input_str or "")
    return input_str[0:4] + ("*" * (len(input_str) - 4))


def curl_json(method, url, headers=None, body=None):
    command = ["curl", "--silent", "--show-error", "--request", method, "--url", url]
    for h in (headers or []):
        command.extend(["--header", h])
    if body is not None:
        command.extend(["--data", jsonlib.dumps(body)])
    result = run(command, check=False, stdout=PIPE, stderr=PIPE)
    stdout = result.stdout.decode("utf-8").strip() if result.stdout else ""
    try:
        parsed = jsonlib.loads(stdout) if stdout else {}
    except jsonlib.JSONDecodeError:
        parsed = {"_raw": stdout}
    return result.returncode, parsed


print("Input parameters")
print("=" * 100)
print("gh_repo_url         :", gh_repo_url)
print("gh_api_token        :", obfuscate(gh_api_token))
print("baseline_ref        :", baseline_ref)
print("target_branch       :", target_branch)
print("reset_files         :", reset_files)
print("concert_url         :", concert_url)
print("concert_api_key     :", obfuscate(concert_api_key))
print("concert_instance_id :", concert_instance_id)
print("=" * 100)

match = re.match(r"https://github\.com/([^/]+)/([^/]+?)(?:\.git)?/?$", gh_repo_url)
if not match:
    print("ERROR - Could not parse owner/repo out of gh_repo_url:", gh_repo_url)
    sys_exit(1)
owner, repo = match.group(1), match.group(2)

gh_headers = [
    f"Authorization: Bearer {gh_api_token}",
    "Accept: application/vnd.github+json",
    "Content-Type: application/json",
]

files = jsonlib.loads(reset_files)
reset_results = {}

for path in files:
    baseline_url = f"https://api.github.com/repos/{owner}/{repo}/contents/{path}?ref={baseline_ref}"
    rc, baseline_data = curl_json("GET", baseline_url, gh_headers)
    if rc != 0 or "content" not in baseline_data:
        print(f"ERROR - Could not fetch {path} at {baseline_ref}:", baseline_data)
        sys_exit(1)
    baseline_content_b64 = baseline_data["content"].replace("\n", "")

    current_url = f"https://api.github.com/repos/{owner}/{repo}/contents/{path}?ref={target_branch}"
    rc, current_data = curl_json("GET", current_url, gh_headers)
    if rc != 0 or "sha" not in current_data:
        print(f"ERROR - Could not fetch current {path} on {target_branch}:", current_data)
        sys_exit(1)
    current_sha = current_data["sha"]

    if current_data["content"].replace("\n", "") == baseline_content_b64:
        print(f"{path} already matches {baseline_ref} - nothing to reset")
        reset_results[path] = "already_reset"
        continue

    update_url = f"https://api.github.com/repos/{owner}/{repo}/contents/{path}"
    update_body = {
        "message": f"chore(demo): reset {path} to vulnerable-baseline for repeatable demo",
        "content": baseline_content_b64,
        "sha": current_sha,
        "branch": target_branch,
    }
    rc, update_data = curl_json("PUT", update_url, gh_headers, update_body)
    if rc != 0 or "commit" not in update_data:
        print(f"ERROR - Could not reset {path}:", update_data)
        sys_exit(1)
    commit_sha = update_data["commit"]["sha"][:7]
    print(f"Reset {path} to {baseline_ref} (commit {commit_sha})")
    reset_results[path] = "reset"

print("Code reset complete:", reset_results)
print("(pushing to", target_branch, "will trigger the build-and-push GitHub Action, republishing the vulnerable image to GHCR)")

concert_headers = [
    f"Authorization: C_API_KEY {concert_api_key}",
    f"InstanceId: {concert_instance_id}",
]

def wipe_collection(name):
    list_url = f"{concert_url.rstrip('/')}/core/api/v1/{name}"
    rc, data = curl_json("GET", list_url, concert_headers)
    items = data.get(name, [])
    print(f"Concert {name}: found {len(items)} to delete")
    for item in items:
        item_id = item.get("id")
        rc, _ = curl_json("DELETE", f"{list_url}/{item_id}", concert_headers)
        print(f"  deleted {name[:-1]} {item_id}: {'ok' if rc == 0 else 'FAILED'}")

for collection in ("applications", "source_repos", "build_artifacts", "environments"):
    wipe_collection(collection)

certs_url = f"{concert_url.rstrip('/')}/core/api/v1/certificates"
rc, certs_data = curl_json("GET", certs_url, concert_headers)
serials = [c.get("serial_number") for c in certs_data.get("certificates", []) if c.get("serial_number")]
if serials:
    print(f"Concert certificates: found {len(serials)} to delete")
    delete_url = f"{concert_url.rstrip('/')}/ingestion/api/v1/certificates/delete"
    delete_headers = concert_headers + ["Content-Type: application/json-patch+json"]
    rc, _ = curl_json("POST", delete_url, delete_headers, {"certificates": serials})
    print("  certificate delete:", "ok" if rc == 0 else "FAILED")
else:
    print("Concert certificates: none found")

print("Concert instance wiped - ready for a fresh demo run.")
`

meta.description: Resets the demo to a repeatable starting point: reverts the two vulnerable files on main back to the vulnerable-baseline git tag, and deletes all applications/source_repos/build_artifacts/environments/certificates from the Concert instance. Run this before every demo.
